description: before_action with authenticate_user! — canonical DHH naming, bang signals side-effectful auth
input:
class AccountsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!
  before_action :set_account
  before_action :require_owner!, only: %i[ edit update destroy ]

  private
    def set_account
      @account = current_user.accounts.find(params.expect(:id))
    end

    def require_owner!
      redirect_to root_path, alert: 'Not authorized.' unless @account.owner?(current_user)
    end
end
